data.tagline: Refined essentials for the modern woman. Timeless silhouettes, considered fabrics, quiet luxury.
data.brandStoryText:
AURA. was founded on the belief that great style begins with restraint. Every piece in our collection is designed to transcend seasons, crafted from the finest natural materials, and made to become a lasting part of your wardrobe.

We work with artisan ateliers across Europe, choosing quality over quantity. Our collections are deliberately small, each garment considered, refined, and released only when it meets our exacting standards.
data.newsletterHeading: Stay in the World of AURA.
data.newsletterSubtext: Be the first to discover new arrivals, exclusive edits, and stories from our excellent atelier.
data.footerText: AURA. is a luxury womenswear label dedicated to quiet elegance and timeless design.

galleryImages.alt: Fashion editorial — model in flowing dress against soft backdrop
Behind the scenes at the AURA atelier
Minimalist fabric swatches and design sketches
Model walking in tailored look on clean white background
AURA boutique interior with curated clothing display
Elegant dress in motion capturing fabric drape
Silk garment detail showing lustre and texture
Editorial portrait — effortless layered styling
Linen and wool outerwear hung in natural light
Folded cashmere knits in warm neutral tones
